name: Chocolate Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix Graham Cracker crumbs, sugar and butter, and press to bottom and sides of 10 or 10-1/2 inch Springform Pan.
2. Warm cream cheese to room temperature.
3. In a large bowl, beat cream cheese, flour and sugar until smooth with an electric mixer on low to medium speed.
4. With the mixer on low, add cocoa.
5. Turn the mixer to medium, and beat in eggs one-at-a-time.
6. Pour batter into crust.
7. Bake at 350°F for 40-45 minutes, or until firm at center.
8. Leave in pan, and cool on a wire rack.
9. Refrigerate at least 3 hours.
10. Loosen from sides of the pan with a knife, and remove from pan.
11. Decorate with shaved semi-sweet chocolate and/or fresh mint sprigs.
